reason_user_confirmation_required: ict-engine workflow_snapshot explicitly blocks historical-data reuse until user_selected_historical_data; running factor-research without selection would violate the recorded command contract.

dataset_options.label: Recorded NQ LTF JSON (recommended)
dataset_options.why: This is the exact path emitted by ict-engine workflow as the deferred Board B factor-research command after accepted SessionLiquidityCoreViable handoff.

dataset_options.label: Auto-Quant NQ 15m full history
dataset_options.why: Longest NQ 15m history found: 351288 rows, 2011-01-02 through 2025-12-31. Requires conversion to ict-engine candle JSON before factor-research.
dataset_options.command: convert feather to candle JSON, then ict-engine factor-research --symbol NQ --data <converted-json> --state-dir <selected-state>

dataset_options.label: Auto-Quant NQ 5m full history
dataset_options.why: Most granular NQ history found: 1053341 rows, 2011-01-02 through 2025-12-31. Heavier conversion/runtime cost.
dataset_options.command: convert feather to candle JSON, then ict-engine factor-research --symbol NQ --data <converted-json> --data-5m <converted-json> --state-dir <selected-state>

dataset_options.label: Recorded NQ multi-timeframe bundle
dataset_options.why: Recorded live multi-timeframe artifact from the accepted95 full-chain run; useful if Board B should research MTF context instead of LTF trigger data.
